title: Instructions for saving your soul from bootlegs
display_title: Instructions for saving your soul from bootlegs
wikitext:
[]: Instructions for saving your soul from bootlegs Post by bp32 » Mon Jun 09, 2008 4:48 pm Just saw this: [link to bootleg purchase removed] It is region free with the wrong title (plus the low, low price), so I am assuming this is a straight up bootleg--but god am I dying to get my hands on something with English subs at this point...

[]: Re: First Bootleg? Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jun 09, 2008 5:00 pm bp32 wrote: something with English subs at this point...

[]: Re: First Bootleg? Post by bp32 » Mon Jun 09, 2008 5:15 pm Mr. Tines wrote: bp32 wrote: something with English subs at this point...

[]: Re: First Bootleg? Post by iamsynch » Mon Jun 09, 2008 5:37 pm bp32 wrote: Can't seem to find one where everything is already put together. Not that I am all that sure where to look...

[]: Post by slothen » Mon Jun 09, 2008 8:10 pm im fairly sure there's a version out there that doesn't require a separate subtitles file.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 09, 2008 8:15 pm Wow. Old member is old. but yeah. Torrenting or just downloading the movie via Realplayer from Crunchyroll (a "download this" tab appears on Youtube and Crunchyroll....for me at least. no idea why though) is the best way to have the film until an official Region-1 release is out.

[]: Post by Iron Rooster » Mon Jun 09, 2008 9:53 pm You know, I used some of the subs and vids floating around to create an avi video file with subs burned in. You can't remove them, but someone like me probably wouldn't want them removed. I have no idea how to post files online though, if you're really, really desperate I could try to figure out how to post it on bittorrent. It's a 700mb file and I don't have the authority at my home to leave the computer on all night for other people to receive a file that large. On a side note, the format is great for converting into iPod friendly formats. Great for portable Eva! It really complements the entire show that's also on my iPod. I really need to get EoE on there too.

[]: Post by Dartz » Tue Jun 10, 2008 12:54 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Wow. Old member is old. but yeah. Torrenting or just downloading the movie via Realplayer from Crunchyroll (a "download this" tab appears on Youtube and Crunchyroll....for me at least. no idea why though) is the best way to have the film until an official Region-1 release is out.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 10, 2008 1:24 am I've PM'd bp32 with details of the usual site to look at to find the Nyoro~n or NF hardsubs.

[]: Post by bp32 » Tue Jun 10, 2008 6:03 am Everyone, Thanks for your help on this!!! I am in the process of DL a subbed version, so hopefully this will tide me over until an official release. If this doesn't work I'll be back :) Thanks again!

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:40 am Is it okay if I lock this now?

[]: Post by bp32 » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:58 am Certainly fine by me--thanks again to everyone for your help.
